munit:test.name: cs-material-recommendation-prc-api-request-subflow_nonRetryable401Error
munit:test.description: Verify HTTP:UNAUTHORIZED (401) is not retried and raises APP:NON_RETRYABLE
munit:test.doc:name: Non-Retryable 401 Raises APP:NON_RETRYABLE Test
munit:test.doc:description: Validates that HTTP 401 triggers APP:NON_RETRYABLE without performing retries

munit:set-event.doc:name: Set Initial Event
munit:set-event.doc:description: Initializes httpOperation and correlationId variables for the sub-flow

munit-tools:mock-when.doc:name: Mock HTTP:UNAUTHORIZED Error
munit-tools:mock-when.doc:description: Mocks the PRC API HTTP request to throw HTTP:UNAUTHORIZED (401)

munit-tools:then-return.doc:name: Throw HTTP:UNAUTHORIZED
munit-tools:then-return.doc:description: Simulates a 401 Unauthorized error from the PRC API

try.doc:name: Capture Raised Error
try.doc:description: Wraps sub-flow execution to capture the raised APP:NON_RETRYABLE error

flow-ref.name: cs-material-recommendation-prc-api-request-subflow
flow-ref.doc:name: Execute HTTP Request Sub-Flow
flow-ref.doc:description: Executes the common HTTP request sub-flow under test

on-error-continue.doc:name: Capture APP:NON_RETRYABLE
on-error-continue.doc:description: Catches the APP:NON_RETRYABLE error raised by the sub-flow

munit-tools:assert-equals.doc:name: Assert APP:NON_RETRYABLE Raised
munit-tools:assert-equals.doc:description: Verifies that the error type is APP:NON_RETRYABLE — non-retryable errors must not be retried

munit:test.name: cs-material-recommendation-prc-api-request-subflow_success200
munit:test.description: Verify HTTP 200 completes successfully and vars.nonRetryableError remains null
munit:test.doc:name: Success 200 No Non-Retryable Error Test
munit:test.doc:description: Validates that a 200 response completes the sub-flow without raising APP:NON_RETRYABLE

munit:set-event.doc:name: Set Initial Event
munit:set-event.doc:description: Initializes httpOperation and correlationId variables for the sub-flow

munit-tools:mock-when.doc:name: Mock Successful HTTP 200 Response
munit-tools:mock-when.doc:description: Mocks the PRC API HTTP request to return a 200 success response

flow-ref.name: cs-material-recommendation-prc-api-request-subflow
flow-ref.doc:name: Execute HTTP Request Sub-Flow
flow-ref.doc:description: Invokes the common HTTP request sub-flow expecting a clean success

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert Payload Not Null
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Ensures the response payload is not null after sub-flow execution

munit-tools:assert-that.doc:name: Assert No Non-Retryable Error
munit-tools:assert-that.doc:description: Verifies nonRetryableError was NOT set — no non-retryable failure occurred
